content:
🚀 spritefusion-pixel-snapper | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Cleaning and standardizing AI-generated or procedurally created pixel art to fit a strict grid and color palette, making it suitable for game development and scalable assets.
✨ Key Features: • Snaps pixels to a perfect grid • Ensures consistent grid resolution • Quantizes colors to a strict palette • Preserves details like dithering
📖 Summary: Sprite Fusion Pixel Snapper is a Rust-based tool designed to clean up messy pixel art, particularly that generated by AI, by snapping pixels to a perfect grid and quantizing colors. It ensures consistency in pixel size and position, making art suitable for game development and scalable textures.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
